repair_candidate.pr_title: Repair skill wording proof for bug sweep documentation PRs
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair plan for Clownfish inventory live-pr-inventory-20260617T075124-001.

Source PRs:
- #85621 by @asock: Clarify landable bug sweep skill credential boundaries.
- #85628 by @asock: Clarify small bugfix sweep skill tracking wording.

Scope:
- Keep changes limited to the two skill markdown files already touched by the contributor PRs.
- Preserve the intended wording clarifications around credential boundaries and tracking-log terminology.
- Fix or rerun the failing Real behavior proof for each PR.

Validation:
- pnpm run validate
- pnpm run render -- jobs/openclaw/cluster-example.md --mode plan
- pnpm run worker -- jobs/openclaw/cluster-example.md --mode plan --dry-run
- PR-specific Real behavior proof workflows for #85621 and #85628
- Codex /review before merge recommendation

Credit: carries forward @asock's source PRs #85621 and #85628.
validation_commands: Run or rerun the PR-specific Real behavior proof workflow for #85621 and #85628 after branch repair.
Run Codex /review on each repaired PR before any merge recommendation.
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for @asock on #85621 and #85628.
If replacement PRs become necessary later, include the source PR URLs and attribution in the PR body.
